text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
45 
PRSCRBR_ID 
LABEL: 
Prescriber Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: This variable contains the prescriber identification number as reported by the Part D sponsor on the 
PDE record submitted to CMS. 
Historically, this could be an NPI, DEA identification number, or UPIN. Since NPIs are now required by 
CMS (after April 2013), they appear most frequently
